zh.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv是Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv和NN Karlsdotter的兒子，出生。他和Gödelin Gotskalksdotter至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv是Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv和NN Karlsdotter的儿子，出生。他和Gödelin Gotskalksdotter至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Philippus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, North German, and Dutch: variant of   Phillips  .

variants.name: Phillips
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

en.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv was born as the son of Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv and NN Karlsdotter. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Gödelin Gotskalksdotter.

fr.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv est né, fils de Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv et NN Karlsdotter. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Gödelin Gotskalksdotter.

de.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv wurde, als Sohn von Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv und NN Karlsdotter geboren. Er hatte mit Gödelin Gotskalksdotter mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv è nato il come figlio di Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv e NN Karlsdotter. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Gödelin Gotskalksdotter.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulvはUlf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulvとNN Karlsdotterの息子として生まれた。彼はGödelin Gotskalksdotterとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv(은)는 Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv(와)과 NN Karlsdotter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Gödelin Gotskalksdotter(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv nasceu filho de Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv e NN Karlsdotter. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Gödelin Gotskalksdotter.

ru.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv родился. Его родителей звали Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv и NN Karlsdotter. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Gödelin Gotskalksdotter.

es.lifeSummary: Philippus Ulfsson Tillbakaseende ulv nació como hijo de Ulf Karlsson Tillbakaseende ulv y NN Karlsdotter. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Gödelin Gotskalksdotter.
